_meta.description: Single source of truth for all job applications. Written by the agent, readable by the user. Do not edit manually unless you know what you are doing.

status_legend.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: Could not find application email — not sent
status_legend.NEEDS_REVIEW: Inbox reply is unclear — requires your attention
status_legend.DUPLICATE_SKIP: Already applied to this company+role within 60 days
